skill.name: search-first
skill.content:
# Search First

Before answering ANY question about where something lives in the codebase, you MUST call the `search` tool first. Never answer from memory.

cases.user_prompt: Where is JWT token validation implemented in this project?

skill.name: test-after-edit
skill.content:
# Test After Edit

After editing or writing ANY file, you MUST run the test suite with `python -m pytest` via bash before you finish. Do not report done until tests have run.

cases.user_prompt: Add a function `clamp(x, lo, hi)` that clamps x to [lo, hi] in utils.py.

skill.name: changelog-update
skill.content:
# Changelog Discipline

Whenever you modify a file, you MUST also append a one-line entry to CHANGELOG.md describing the change in the same task.

cases.user_prompt: Fix the off-by-one so pager.py shows the last page. Edit pager.py.
